channel.title: Communism" on Caio Barros
channel.description: Recent content in Communism" on Caio Barros

item.title: Was Prokofiev Lured into the Soviet Union? Examining the Evidence
item.description: Last update (2025-06-16): I got access to the book Ryadom s velikimi, edited by Nelly Kravetz, which contains the full correspondence between Prokofiev and L. Atovmyan and Antovmyan’s memoirs. I transcribed all letters between 1932 and 1936 here and, with that, the section on the Atovmyan-Prokofiev correponce was substancially changed. I’m still working on the analysis of Atovmyan’s memoirs and should have soon access to more primary evidence to complete the other sections.
